summary: SQLite store and HTTP disk cache (dirs/files/WAL/SHM) restricted to owner-only (0o700/0o600).
reason: Same world-readable class Greptile flagged on godaddy: store/cache were created 0o755 dir + umask-default file, leaving locally cached account/session data readable by other local users. Hardened proactively to match the midjourney/godaddy reference.
